bio: Hey! I'm Alex — a full stack developer who loves building things that live on the web. I got into programming by modding Minecraft servers at 14 and never looked back. These days I'm obsessed with developer tooling, creative coding, and making UIs that feel alive.
funFacts: I've contributed to 3 open-source projects with 1k+ stars
My dotfiles repo is my most-starred project
I can solve a Rubik's cube in under 2 minutes
I've been to 12 countries and counting

currently.reading: Project Hail Mary by Andy Weir
currently.building: A CLI tool for managing dotfiles
